body:
## Problem

MetalForge has technique PROFILE pages (/technique/<slug>) and gear breakdown ARTICLES (/articles/<slug>), but NO instructional HowTo tutorial articles.

'How to play blast beats', 'how to play double bass drums', 'how to tune drums for metal' are high-volume queries with educational intent. These are not served by profile-style technique pages or kit-spec articles.

HowTo schema is eligible for Google AI Overviews (high priority since 2024 Search algorithm shift). The site has zero HowTo articles currently.

## Status

Already shipped in commit ed77b9f (PR #1599). All 5 HowTo tutorial articles added to packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js with articleSection: 'HowTo' and 5 howToSteps each. SSR HowTo JSON-LD emission added to api/meta/[...path].js at line 862. Validated: syntax OK, 5 steps per article, 3 relatedDrummers per article, 1300-1700 words per article.
title: SEO batch: Technique HowTo editorial articles — 5 new instructional articles with HowTo schema
